commands.review_summary:
This PR extracts memory-wiki vault page writes into a shared helper and retries transient fs-safe `path-mismatch` write races for imported source and OKF page writes.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +94. Total +115 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level and PR-supplied real filesystem proof: current main writes once through `writeImportedSourcePage`, while the PR body reports old 0/60 versus new 60/60 on a real fs-safe vault root. I did not run a live multi-process gateway race in this read-only pass.
